seoTitle: How to Create a Number Photo Collage in Canva
metaDescription: Design a number-shaped photo collage in Canva for birthdays, anniversaries, or milestone celebrations, with tips on layout and personalization.
intro: A number photo collage is a creative way to mark birthdays, anniversaries, or other milestones using your own photos arranged inside a number shape. This tutorial walks through building one in Canva, from picking photos to exporting the final design.

steps.heading: Select photos for your collage
steps.body: Choose the photos that best represent the milestone or occasion you're celebrating.

steps.heading: Choose the layout and design elements
steps.body: Pick a number-shaped layout and any additional design elements that fit your theme.

steps.heading: Add text and customize colors
steps.body: Personalize the collage with text, colors, and styling that match the occasion.

steps.heading: Export your collage for sharing
steps.body: Once finished, export the design so it's ready to print, share, or post online.

faq.question: What occasions work well for a number photo collage?
faq.answer: Birthdays, anniversaries, and other milestone celebrations are common uses for this style of collage.

faq.question: Can businesses use number collages for marketing?
faq.answer: Yes, businesses can use a similar approach to highlight sales milestones or celebrate team achievements.

faq.question: Do I need design experience to make one?
faq.answer: No, Canva's user-friendly interface makes this accessible even for complete beginners.

faq.question: Can I share the collage directly to social media?
faq.answer: Yes, once exported, the collage can be shared directly to social platforms or downloaded for printing.
